creator: k-nishizawa@anet.ne.jp
text:
Version Up 0.6 -> 0.7
PLIST is changed.

----------------------------------------------------

diff -ruN rio500.bak/Makefile rio500/Makefile
--- rio500.bak/Makefile Mon Jul 10 12:11:35 2000
+++ rio500/Makefile     Sat Jul 15 00:37:08 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=       rio500
-PORTVERSION=   0.6
+PORTVERSION=   0.7
 CATEGORIES=     audio
 MASTER_SITES=   http://download.sourceforge.net/rio500/
 
diff -ruN rio500.bak/files/md5 rio500/files/md5
--- rio500.bak/files/md5        Mon Jul 10 12:11:38 2000
+++ rio500/files/md5    Fri Jun 23 21:06:54 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (rio500-0.6.tar.gz) = 392922c9b1509ced1bbc26d33f1e5270
+MD5 (rio500-0.7.tar.gz) = f624c255d6a538205a63a9bada4e5d89
diff -ruN rio500.bak/pkg/PLIST rio500/pkg/PLIST
--- rio500.bak/pkg/PLIST        Mon Jul 10 12:11:38 2000
+++ rio500/pkg/PLIST    Fri Jun 23 21:13:35 2000
@@ -11,9 +11,6 @@
 include/libpsf.h
 include/librio500.h
 include/librio500_api.h
-include/rio500_usb.h
-include/usbdevfs.h
-include/usbdevice_fs.h
 lib/librio500.a
 lib/librio500_api.a
 share/rio500/fonts/6581.fon
